title: Taurus and P2P.org advance staking for financial institutions globally
message_html: Taurus and P2P.org advance staking for financial institutions globally ...
snippet: P2P.org, non-custodial validator infrastructure securing over $10B in delegated assets across 50+ networks, and Taurus, a global leader in digital asset infrastructure, today announced a partnership to integrate P2P.org’s institutional-grade staking infrastructure into Taurus’ digital asset platform

title: Pyth launches 24/7 proprietary indices for US equities, oil and metals
message_html: Pyth launches 24/7 proprietary indices for US equities, oil and metals ...
snippet: Pyth is aggregating data from onchain and offchain sources to provide continuous price discovery for major equities and commodities.
